message:
fix: Provide C++ exception ABI for wasm32-wasi (numpy variant link)

zig cc provides libc++ but not libc++abi for wasm32-wasi. The C++ exception
functions (__cxa_allocate_exception, __cxa_throw, __cxa_begin_catch,
__cxa_end_catch) are referenced by pocketfft_umath.cpp and unique.cpp.

Since WASI has no stack unwinding support, throwing a C++ exception
terminates the program via abort(). This matches the behavior of other
WASI C++ runtimes.

Also fix npy_set_blas_supports_fpe return type (int, not void) to match
numpy's declaration in multiarraymodule.c.
